title: Surfin' U.S.A.
why_this_song: Surfin' U.S.A. by The Beach Boys (1963) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 19 times; first heard in: "Then everybody'd be surfin'"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Everybody's gone surfin'"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Everybody's gone surfin'"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "We're gonna take real soon"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "You'd seem 'em wearing their baggies"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "surfin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "surfin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gone" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Beach Boys one question about "Surfin' U.S.A.", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Beach Boys sobre "Surfin' U.S.A.", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Surfin' U.S.A." in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Surfin' U.S.A." com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Surfin' U.S.A." in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Surfin' U.S.A." em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
